mapper.select: SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CTR_LIST.checkup_contract_id , CTR_LIST.hospital_id , CTR_LIST.center_id , CONTT.checkup_contract_type_id , IF(CONTT.checkup_contract_type_id IS NULL, 0, 1) AS register FROM company_checkup CC JOIN company C ON CC.company_id = C.company_id AND C.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT checkup_contract.company_checkup_id, checkup_contract.checkup_contract_id, checkup_contract.hospital_id, checkup_contract_type.center_id FROM checkup_contract JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract.checkup_contract_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_id) CTR_LIST ON CC.company_checkup_id = CTR_LIST.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract CONT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CONT.company_checkup_id AND CTR_LIST.hospital_id = CONT.hospital_id AND CTR_LIST.company_checkup_id = CONT.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_type CONTT ON CCT.company_checkup_type_id = CONTT.company_checkup_type_id AND CONT.checkup_contract_id = CONTT.checkup_contract_id AND CTR_LIST.center_id = CONTT.center_id LEFT JOIN center ON CTR_LIST.center_id = center.center_id LEFT JOIN hospital ON CTR_LIST.hospital_id = hospital.hospital_id WHERE CC.deleted_at IS NULL AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} AND C.company_id = (SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{sessionUserId}) ORDER BY C.company_name, hospital.hospital_name, center.center_name, CCT.company_checkup_type_code
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM checkup_contract WHERE checkup_contract_id = #{checkupContractId} AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM checkup_contract_type WHERE checkup_contract_id = #{checkupContractId}) = 0
mapper.select: SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.hospital_pay , CCT.platform_pay , CTT.checkup_contract_id , CTTT.checkup_contract_type_id , CTTST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , CTTST.sub_type_name , CTTST.upgrade_pay , CTTST.confirmed_check , hospital_center_view.hospital_id , hospital_center_view.hospital_code , hospital_center_view.hospital_name , hospital_center_view.center_id , hospital_center_view.center_code , hospital_center_view.center_name , hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name FROM company C JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract CTT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CTT.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_type CTTT ON CCT.company_checkup_type_id = CTTT.company_checkup_type_id AND CTT.checkup_contract_id = CTTT.checkup_contract_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CTTST ON CTTT.checkup_contract_type_id = CTTST.checkup_contract_type_id AND CTTST.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN hospital_center_view ON CTTT.center_id = hospital_center_view.center_id AND CTT.hospital_id = hospital_center_view.hospital_id WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} ORDER BY CCT.company_checkup_type_code, CCT.company_checkup_type_name, CTTST.sub_type_name

SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CONCAT(C.company_name, ' ( ', CC.checkup_year, ' )') company_name_year , H.hospital_id , H.hospital_code , H.hospital_name , CNT.center_code , CNT.center_name , CNT.head , CTTT.checkup_contract_type_id , CTTT.checkup_contract_id , CTTT.center_id , IF(CNT.head = 0, CONCAT(H.hospital_name, ' ', CNT.center_name), H.hospital_name) hospital_center_name , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.hospital_pay , CCT.platform_pay FROM checkup_contract_type CTTT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CTTT.company_checkup_type_id = CCT.company_checkup_type_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON CCT.company_checkup_id = CC.company_checkup_id JOIN company C ON CC.company_id = C.company_id JOIN center CNT ON CTTT.center_id = CNT.center_id JOIN hospital H ON CNT.hospital_id = H.hospital_id WHERE CTTT.checkup_contract_id = #{checkupContractId} AND CTTT.center_id = #{centerId} ORDER BY CCT.company_checkup_type_code

SELECT item_class_id AS id , item_class_id AS key_id , NULL AS parent_id , NULL AS key_parent_id , 'class' AS item_type , item_class_code AS code , item_class_name AS name , NULL AS hospital_checkup_id , NULL AS hospital_id , NULL AS checkup_year , NULL AS bill , NULL AS register , NULL AS copay , NULL AS discount_bill FROM item_class WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item_category_id AS id , item_category_id + 10000 AS key_id , item_class_id AS parent_id , item_class_id AS key_parent_id , 'category' AS item_type , item_category_code AS code , item_category_name AS name , NULL AS hospital_checkup_id , NULL AS hospital_id , NULL AS checkup_year , NULL AS bill , NULL AS register , NULL AS copay , NULL AS discount_bill FROM item_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item.item_id AS id , item.item_id + 1000000 AS key_id , item.item_category_id AS parent_id , item.item_category_id + 10000 AS key_parent_id , 'item' AS item_type , item.item_code AS code , item.item_name AS name , hospital_checkup.hospital_checkup_id AS hospital_checkup_id , hospital_checkup.hospital_id AS hospital_id , hospital_checkup.checkup_year AS checkup_year , hospital_checkup.bill AS bill , '0' AS register , NULL AS copay , NULL AS discount_bill FROM item LEFT JOIN hospital_checkup ON item.item_id = hospital_checkup.item_id AND hospital_checkup.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND hospital_checkup.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} WHERE item.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT company.company_id , company.company_code , company.company_name , company_checkup.company_checkup_id , company_checkup.checkup_year , CONCAT(company.company_name, ' ( ', company_checkup.checkup_year, ' )') company_name_year , hospital.hospital_id , hospital.hospital_code , hospital.hospital_name , center.center_code , center.center_name , center.head , IF(center.head = 0, CONCAT(hospital.hospital_name, ' ', center.center_name), hospital.hospital_name) hospital_center_name , company_checkup_type.company_checkup_id , company_checkup_type.company_checkup_type_code , company_checkup_type.company_checkup_type_name , company_checkup_type.support_pay , company_checkup_type.copay , company_checkup_type.hospital_pay , company_checkup_type.platform_pay , checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_id , checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id , checkup_contract_sub_type.sub_type_name , checkup_contract_sub_type.upgrade_pay , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_a_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_a_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_b_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_b_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_c_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_c_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_d_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_d_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_e_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_e_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_f_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_f_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.confirmed_check , checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_at , CASE WHEN checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = center_manager.user_id THEN center_manager.center_manager_name WHEN checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = platform_manager.user_id THEN platform_manager.platform_manager_name END AS registered_user_name , checkup_contract_review.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , checkup_contract_review.checkup_contract_review_id , checkup_contract_review.writed_at , checkup_contract_review.review , CASE WHEN checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = center_manager.user_id THEN center_manager.center_manager_name WHEN checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = platform_manager.user_id THEN platform_manager.platform_manager_name END AS writed_user_name FROM checkup_contract_sub_type JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN company_checkup_type ON checkup_contract_type.company_checkup_type_id = company_checkup_type.company_checkup_type_id JOIN company_checkup ON company_checkup_type.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_review ON checkup_contract_review.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id LEFT JOIN center_manager ON checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = center_manager.user_id OR checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = center_manager.user_id LEFT JOIN platform_manager ON checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = platform_manager.user_id OR checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = platform_manager.user_id JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id JOIN center ON checkup_contract_type.center_id = center.center_id JOIN hospital ON center.hospital_id = hospital.hospital_id WHERE checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = #{checkupContractSubTypeId};

SELECT company.company_id , company.company_code , company.company_name , company_checkup.company_checkup_id , company_checkup.checkup_year , CONCAT(company.company_name, ' ( ', company_checkup.checkup_year, ' )') company_name_year , hospital.hospital_id , hospital.hospital_code , hospital.hospital_name , center.center_code , center.center_name , center.head , IF(center.head = 0, CONCAT(hospital.hospital_name, ' ', center.center_name), hospital.hospital_name) hospital_center_name , company_checkup_type.company_checkup_id , company_checkup_type.company_checkup_type_code , company_checkup_type.company_checkup_type_name , company_checkup_type.support_pay , company_checkup_type.copay , company_checkup_type.hospital_pay , company_checkup_type.platform_pay , checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_id , checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id , checkup_contract_sub_type.sub_type_name , checkup_contract_sub_type.upgrade_pay , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_a_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_a_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_b_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_b_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_c_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_c_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_d_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_d_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_e_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_e_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_f_count , checkup_contract_sub_type.select_f_memo , checkup_contract_sub_type.confirmed_check , checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_at , CASE WHEN checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = center_manager.user_id THEN center_manager.center_manager_name WHEN checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = platform_manager.user_id THEN platform_manager.platform_manager_name END AS registered_user_name , checkup_contract_review.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , checkup_contract_review.checkup_contract_review_id , checkup_contract_review.writed_at , checkup_contract_review.review , CASE WHEN checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = center_manager.user_id THEN center_manager.center_manager_name WHEN checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = platform_manager.user_id THEN platform_manager.platform_manager_name END AS writed_user_name FROM checkup_contract_sub_type JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN company_checkup_type ON checkup_contract_type.company_checkup_type_id = company_checkup_type.company_checkup_type_id JOIN company_checkup ON company_checkup_type.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_review ON checkup_contract_review.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id LEFT JOIN center_manager ON checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = center_manager.user_id OR checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = center_manager.user_id LEFT JOIN platform_manager ON checkup_contract_sub_type.registered_user_id = platform_manager.user_id OR checkup_contract_review.writed_user_id = platform_manager.user_id JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id JOIN center ON checkup_contract_type.center_id = center.center_id JOIN hospital ON center.hospital_id = hospital.hospital_id WHERE hospital.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND checkup_contract_sub_type.confirmed_check = true;

SELECT item_class_id AS id , item_class_id AS key_id , NULL AS parent_id , NULL AS key_parent_id , 'class' AS item_type , item_class_code AS code , item_class_name AS name , NULL AS hospital_checkup_id , NULL AS hospital_id , NULL AS checkup_year , NULL AS bill , NULL AS checkup_contract_item_id , NULL AS checkup_contract_sub_type_id , NULL AS checkup_contract_item_memo , NULL AS register , NULL AS copay , NULL AS discount_bill FROM item_class WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item_category_id AS id , item_category_id + 10000 AS key_id , item_class_id AS parent_id , item_class_id AS key_parent_id , 'category' AS item_type , item_category_code AS code , item_category_name AS name , NULL AS hospital_checkup_id , NULL AS hospital_id , NULL AS checkup_year , NULL AS bill , NULL AS checkup_contract_item_id , NULL AS checkup_contract_sub_type_id , NULL AS checkup_contract_item_memo , NULL AS register , NULL AS copay , NULL AS discount_bill FROM item_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item.item_id AS id , item.item_id + 1000000 AS key_id , item.item_category_id AS parent_id , item.item_category_id + 10000 AS key_parent_id , 'item' AS item_type , item.item_code AS code , item.item_name AS name , hospital_checkup.hospital_checkup_id AS hospital_checkup_id , hospital_checkup.hospital_id AS hospital_id , hospital_checkup.checkup_year AS checkup_year , hospital_checkup.bill AS bill , checkup_contract_item.checkup_contract_item_id AS checkup_contract_item_id , checkup_contract_item.checkup_contract_sub_type_id AS checkup_contract_sub_type_id , checkup_contract_item.checkup_contract_item_memo AS checkup_contract_item_memo , IFNULL(checkup_contract_item.register, 0) AS register , checkup_contract_item.copay AS copay , checkup_contract_item.discount_bill AS discount_bill FROM item LEFT JOIN hospital_checkup ON item.item_id = hospital_checkup.item_id AND hospital_checkup.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND hospital_checkup.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_item ON item.item_id = checkup_contract_item.item_id AND checkup_contract_item.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = #{checkupContractSubTypeId} WHERE item.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.hospital_pay , CCT.platform_pay , CTT.checkup_contract_id , CTTT.checkup_contract_type_id , CTTST.checkup_contract_sub_type_id , CTTST.sub_type_name , CTTST.upgrade_pay , hospital_center_view.hospital_id , hospital_center_view.hospital_code , hospital_center_view.hospital_name , hospital_center_view.center_id , hospital_center_view.center_code , hospital_center_view.center_name , hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name , CTTST.created_user_id , CTTST.created_at , sf_user_name(CTTST.created_user_id) AS manager_name FROM company C JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract CTT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CTT.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_type CTTT ON CCT.company_checkup_type_id = CTTT.company_checkup_type_id AND CTT.checkup_contract_id = CTTT.checkup_contract_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type CTTST ON CTTT.checkup_contract_type_id = CTTST.checkup_contract_type_id AND CTTST.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN hospital_center_view ON CTTT.center_id = hospital_center_view.center_id AND CTT.hospital_id = hospital_center_view.hospital_id LEFT JOIN center_manager_company CMC on C.company_id = CMC.company_id WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} AND CTTST.created_user_id IS NOT NULL AND hospital_center_view.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND CMC.deleted_at IS NULL AND CMC.user_id = #{sessionUserId} ORDER BY CCT.company_checkup_type_code, CCT.company_checkup_type_name, CTTST.sub_type_name
